flags.message: Decisive forward signal disclosure: the forecast leans heavily on the cert grants in the companion assault-weapons cases (Viramontes v. Cook County, 25-238, consolidated with Grant v. Higgins), reported the week of this snapshot, plus this petition being held over at the June 30, 2026 clean-up conference rather than denied. These are companion-case developments, not this case's outcome (the petition remains pending), so this is the good-hygiene note the leakage doctrine asks for, not a violation. Also worth knowing for scoring: the likeliest resolution is a GVR after the AWB merits decision, i.e. this event may not resolve until ~June 2027.
